steps.title: Identify the structural signal
steps.content: The key signal is “However” introducing an alternative approach, followed by “thus capitalizing on research potential.” This creates the passage's structure: traditional method (ancient DNA), then alternative approach with great promise (historical DNA).

steps.title: Match the answer
steps.content: B correctly describes the two-approach structure with emphasis on one approach's promise. A, C, and D misread the passage: claiming it explains why the method is underused, inventing a challenge to prior findings, or overstating emphasis as asserting superiority. That matches choice B — B is correct.
